allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\);const d=JSON.parse\(j\);console.log\('cookies:', d.cookies?.length || 0\);d.cookies?.forEach\(c=>console.log\(c.name, c.domain, c.path, c.value?.substring\(0,30\)+'...'\)\);console.log\('origins:', d.origins?.length || 0\);d.origins?.forEach\(o=>{console.log\(o.origin\);o.localStorage?.forEach\(l=>console.log\('  ls:', l.name, l.value?.substring\(0,50\)+'...'\)\)}\)")
